title: Myrmecodendron cookii

The classification of this plant is as follows: it is placed in the genus Myrmecodendron, which is a part of the family Sapotaceae. The family Sapotaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as sapote or soapberry. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its flowers, leaves, and fruit.
